title: I can't comment on my videos

enrichment.summary: Kyle explains that he has been unable to comment on roughly 9% of his own videos since he started uploading, suspects YouTube has restricted his commenting ability as a penalty (possibly due to his being a stoner or a prior incident in 2011 where he got drunk and posted explicit videos that YouTube deleted), and misses the interaction since commenting was one of his favorite things about the platform.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: One of his favorite things about YouTube; genuinely misses the interaction
Rarely does it — only after someone relentlessly posts long attacks across multiple videos
Suspects it's retaliation or a penalty, possibly tied to his 2011 explicit video or his status as a stoner, but has no confirmation
Hasn't bothered and doesn't plan to, though the issue is starting to annoy him
